task_completion.description: Navigate to the Repository Layouts configuration page in JFrog Artifactory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JFrog Artifactory Administration UI is visible, specifically the 'Repositories' -> 'Layouts' settings page.
In the new layout creation form, the 'Layout Name' input field contains exactly 'flat-org-layout'.
The 'Artifact Path Pattern' input field contains exactly '[org]/[module]/[baseRev]/[module]-[baseRev](-[classifier]).[ext]'.
The 'Descriptor Path Pattern' input field contains exactly '[org]/[module]/[baseRev]/[module]-[baseRev].pom'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Folder Integration Revision RegExp
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Folder Integration Revision RegExp' input field contains exactly 'SNAPSHOT'.

task_completion.description: Configure the File Integration Revision RegExp
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'File Integration Revision RegExp' input field contains exactly 'SNAPSHOT'.
The layout is saved successfully, evidenced by 'flat-org-layout' appearing in the list of existing Repository Layouts or a success notification indicating the layout was created.

integrity.description: Agent used the JFrog Artifactory web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual JFrog Artifactory web browser UI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts like cURL.

integrity.description: Agent entered information into the correct application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The path patterns and regexps are typed into the Artifactory layout configuration form, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the layout list
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open to manipulate the DOM and fake the presence of 'flat-org-layout'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Layout Name: 'flat-org-layout'. Artifact Path Pattern: '[org]/[module]/[baseRev]/[module]-[baseRev](-[classifier]).[ext]'. Descriptor Path Pattern: '[org]/[module]/[baseRev]/[module]-[baseRev].pom'. Folder Integration Revision RegExp: 'SNAPSHOT'. File Integration Revision RegExp: 'SNAPSHOT'.
